scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run alt-check && vitest run
scripts.update:csp: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const csp = fs.readFileSync('audit-output/csp.txt', 'utf8'); console.log('CSP Updated');"
scripts.generate:inventory: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('audit-output/component-inventory.json','utf8')).components; const csv = ['path,type,exports,props,accessibility,reuseScore,todoComments,size'].concat(data.map(c=>[c.path,c.type,c.exports.join('|'),JSON.stringify(c.props).replace(/\"/g,'\''),JSON.stringify(c.accessibility),c.reuseScore,c.todoComments,c.sizeInLines].join(','))).join('\n'); fs.writeFileSync('audit-output/component-inventory.csv',csv);"
scripts.generate:accessibility:
node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('audit-output/accessibility.json','utf8')); let out = ''; data.forEach(page => { page.issues.forEach(issue => { out += '### 🎫 ' + page.page + ' - ' + issue.type + '
- **Element**: `' + issue.element + '`
- **Severity**: ' + issue.severity + '
- **Recommendation**: ' + issue.recommendation + '

'; }); }); fs.writeFileSync('audit-output/accessibility-tickets.md', out);"
scripts.generate:erd: echo 'ERD rendering requires mmdc which is not installed. Skipping. SVG generation.'
scripts.post-audit: npm run extract:tokens && npm run update:csp && npm run generate:inventory && npm run generate:accessibility && npm run generate:erd
